description: Declarative repository fixture containing 15 unique Python relevance-3 query/annotation pairs from CodeSearchNet. This is a bounded lexical routing fixture, not a reproduction of semantic retrieval or NDCG.

files.README.md:
# CodeSearchNet Public Routing Fixture

This deterministic fixture contains 15 selected CodeSearchNet published queries and their unique Python relevance-3 annotation records.

No target repository source code is copied. Published GitHub URLs are retained only as annotation evidence and provenance. This fixture supports bounded, case-sensitive fixed-string lookup; it does not reproduce semantic code retrieval, ranking, or NDCG.

Source revision: bb121a53a559e99a6849409355ee5c83803f2e87
License: MIT; the pinned notice is preserved in benchmark/coding/fixtures/CODESEARCHNET_LICENSE.txt.

get current process id
randomly extract x items from a list
parse binary file to custom class
group by count
linear regression

provenance.selection: Fifteen exact published queries paired with unique Python annotations whose relevance is 3; all indices are zero-based and exclude headers.
provenance.adaptation: Only selected MIT-licensed CodeSearchNet query and annotation records are normalized. No target source code is copied. The fixture evaluates lexical routing and annotation lookup, not semantic retrieval or NDCG.
